reviews.review_description:
I love this app! It's very simple but I find peace in its simplicity. A number of locations to satisfy everyone or your changing mood. 
I love that you can enjoy the sights, the sounds and background music all together or interchangeable as you prefer.
The voice can recite your favorite Psalms, Proverbs or just coach you in some relaxed meditation. 
You truly can customize it to your preference.
